name: kolm-stack
description: kolm - the private AI compiler. Compile your task into a signed .kolm artifact from your own examples, that runs on your hardware. (Real weight-training is the opt-in, GPU-gated distill tier.)

scripts.build:control-files: npm run build:file-ledger && npm run build:design-cascade-ledger && npm run build:wave-registry && npm run build:catalog-manifest && npm run build:product-media-proof
scripts.verify:control-files: npm run verify:file-ledger && npm run verify:design-cascade-ledger && npm run verify:wave-registry && npm run verify:catalog-manifest && npm run verify:product-media-proof
scripts.lint:refs: node scripts/audit-static-refs.cjs && node scripts/audit-href.cjs --strict && node scripts/verify-product-surfaces.cjs
scripts.verify:inventions: node scripts/simulate-invention-portfolio.cjs --summary && npm run verify:invention-spec && npm run verify:frontier-map && npm run verify:math-frontier && npm run verify:invention-buildbook && npm run verify:research-atlas
scripts.verify:quant-oracle: node scripts/quantization-oracle.mjs --task extraction --device rtx-4090-24gb --params-b 7 --context 8192 --calibration-rows 256 && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/wave582-quantization-oracle.test.js tests/wave605-quantization-oracle-frontier.test.js tests/wave606-quant-accuracy-floor.test.js
scripts.verify:distill-strategy: node scripts/distill-strategy.mjs --simulate anthropic --task generation --real-pairs 1500 --holdout-pairs 300 --summary --require-ready && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/wave584-distill-strategy.test.js tests/wave604-distill-strategy-frontier.test.js
scripts.verify:package-release: node scripts/package-release-readiness.mjs --summary --require-local-contract && node scripts/package-release-readiness.mjs --smoke-installers --summary && node scripts/package-release-readiness.mjs --run-local-checks --summary && npm --prefix packages/attestation test && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/wave591-package-local-build-contract.test.js
scripts.verify:depth: node scripts/audit-product-kernel.cjs --json && node scripts/audit-product-journeys.mjs --json && node scripts/cloud-readiness.mjs --summary --json && node scripts/build-codegraph.mjs --check --json && npm run verify:backend-atomic && npm run verify:stack-sota && node scripts/simulate-invention-portfolio.cjs --summary && npm run verify:invention-spec && npm run verify:frontier-map && npm run verify:math-frontier && npm run verify:invention-buildbook && npm run verify:research-atlas && npm run verify:build-strategy && node scripts/bench-redaction-fixtures.mjs --min-f1 0.95 --min-recall 0.95 --max-fp 0 && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/wave581-redaction-benchmark.test.js tests/wave586-redaction-public-benchmark-contract.test.js && npm run verify:kscore-calibration && npm run verify:quality-calibration && npm run verify:benchmark-evidence && npm run verify:governance-packets && npm run verify:compliance-packet && npm run verify:quant-oracle && npm run verify:kv-cache && npm run verify:llm-routing && node scripts/cloud-compute-broker.mjs --simulate runpod-r2 --workload train --params-b 7 --rows 2000 --no-local-gpu --summary --require-ready && npm run verify:distill-strategy && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/wave409u-federated-foundation.test.js tests/wave585-federated-robust-aggregation.test.js tests/wave538-federated-route-docs.test.js && npm run verify:package-release && node scripts/audit-sota-readiness.cjs && node scripts/build-readiness-closeout.cjs --check && npm run verify:readiness-workorders && node scripts/audit-claim-scope.cjs && npm run verify:brand
scripts.lint: eslint src cli scripts tests workers
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --fix src cli scripts tests workers
